description_long: This rifle features a modern, tactical design with a predominantly white and purple camouflage pattern across its body. The stock is fixed and robust, providing stability for the user, while the pistol grip and handguard are ergonomically shaped for comfort and control. The rifle is equipped with a detachable box magazine, which is also colored in purple, and a standard-length barrel that extends from the handguard. The upper receiver includes a raised sight mount, though only basic iron sights are visible. The overall construction appears to be primarily metal with some polymer components, giving it a durable yet lightweight feel suitable for urban environments.
description: A modern, white and purple camouflaged rifle with a fixed stock, detachable box magazine, and iron sights. The design is tactical and ergonomic, blending metal and polymer materials.
description_view_0: Side profile showing the full length of the rifle, highlighting the fixed stock, handguard, and magazine.
description_view_1: Angled view from the front right, emphasizing the barrel, magazine, and pistol grip.
description_view_2: Opposite side profile, clearly displaying the stock, receiver, and handguard details.
description_view_3: Front-on view focusing on the muzzle, handguard, and the alignment of the magazine and grip.
